positive: A stylized, minimalist geometric pattern featuring interlocking constellations and celestial bodies. The design is rendered in deep indigo, cosmic violet, and striking metallic gold accents. Composition is central and symmetrical, suitable for a repeating tile pattern. Use clean, sharp silhouettes and lines. Background texture should be subtle, like deep space dust, allowing the main golden constellation lines to pop with high contrast. Art style must be a blend of Art Deco geometry and modern scientific illustration. Perfect for screen printing on dark fabric. High detail, high contrast, vibrant color separation, clean lines.
negative: blur, grainy, low contrast, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, dirty, noise, poor anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts
